message:
Merge PR #2515: fix(beads): add --flat flag to bd list for valid JSON output

bd's tree mode doesn't produce valid JSON even with --json flag.
Adding --flat ensures programmatic callers get parseable output.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2515
Author: jeremyplichta (Jeremy Plichta)

Co-authored-by: Jeremy Plichta <jeremyplichta@users.noreply.github.com>
